name: drifter
plan: 29 cargo used. 46 slots open. That is not a full haul — that is a half-finished batch. The belt is right here. Fill it. Titanium and darksteel already in hold, good material. Iron ore is 4 units — not enough for a meaningful steel run yet, but more mining will fix that. After the hold is full, dock at War Citadel, run a steel craft cycle on whatever iron I pull in. 296 plates in storage already. More is more. Fleet needs to know the stockpile is active. Post in faction chat — not intent, output.
currentGoal: Mine at War Materials until cargo is at least 65/75. Do not specify a resource — use `sm mine` with no target to avoid the targeting bug. Prioritize filling the hold.
